prerequisites.value: Channel positive energy class feature, worshiper of a god of self-perfection or inner mastery.

description.value: **Benefit:** When you channel positive energy to heal living creatures, any creature that could be healed by the channeled energy can choose to regain ki from it instead. Affected creatures regain a number of ki points equal to the number of dice healed by the channel. A creature regaining ki in such a way must either regain ki or be healed by the channel (it cannot gain both).
